titleStmt.title: SII 8.383: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 383. (A.R. No. 98 of 1903). ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śuṣamastu . cakāttam Āyirattu Aññūṟṟukkumel cellāniṉṟa vikkiṟamavaruṣam Āṭimātam Iraṇṭāvatu perampalattuṟaiyum paṇṭāram nāyakkar Ayyaṉ mutaliyār Ayyaṉ Ivarkaḷ muṉpāka vakai yaṟṟapaṭi muṉṉāḷ taṟmacādha ttiyattukkum paṟṟivarukiṟa nāṉūṟṟu Aṉpatu poṉṉum kāṇikkaikku kaṭṭaḷai
nātatevapaṇṭārattukku rāmīcuram pūcakar si cantiracekarauṭaiyar ciṣyarāṉa caṟuvecarakurukkaḷ poṉ Irunūṟṟu Aṉpatu Ākap poṉ Eḻunūṟum canṉativācalile paṟṟikkoṇṭu cuvāmiyāṟku kāṇikkai kalluk kaṟaṭu paṭṭup vati pacu yāṉai kutirai maiṣāntiram yetu vantālum �
ṇapaṭṭar meṉācciṉapaṭṭa rāmacantiramutaliyār rāmāyaṇapaṭṭar Aṉavarumom māramaṅkala poṉ ṉeḻunūṟum paṟṟikkoṇṭu pūcai parikāram kuṟaivaṟa paṇṇivarakkaṭavomānom . yintappaṭikku maturai cokkanātaṉ caṉṉati kopuravācalile kalveṭṭuppaṭikku tappāma
mutal yiṉṉāḻikaivaraiyum vanta kāṇikkai rāmanātaṉukku yirukūṟum Eṅkaḷukku munṟukūṟumāka naṭantuvarukaiyil rāmappāṇāyaṉpaṭṭaṇattil rācāupaiyam veḷḷittaṭikkum cuvāmi Irāmanātaṉ pātattāṇaiye Eṅkaḷ Ācāriyar Āṇaiye nāyakkar Ayyaṉ pātattāṇaiye tappāmal naṭakkakkaṭavomākavum ṉāḷ 1- kku tiṉappaṭi cuvantiram pūcaippaṇamum Eppoḻutu
vantu Atu mukāntiramāka maturaikkup poy vicuvanātanāyakka virappanāyakkar Ayyaṉ mutaliyār Appa yaṉṟu teciyaṉ Aṉavaru mippiracātam Arici 1- paṭi cantaṇam pātiyum Uruttirar Aviṣekac cuvatantiramum paṟṟikkoṇṭu pūcai kuṟṟamaṟa paṇṇikkoṇṭu mirukkakkaṭavomākavum . Intappaṭikku Akitampaṇṇiṉavaṉ keṅkaiyilum cetuviThe record is incomplete by a few letters at the end.
Digital edition of SII 8.383 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
